summary:
Profilometers are used to measure surface roughness due to their ability to quantify precise microtopographic features necessary for evaluating orthodontic mini-screws; no other mentioned tools offer similar accuracy suitable for this specific application.
The focus is now solely on identifying the right tool based on required precision without extraneous detail about irrelevant procedures or devices not pertinent here.
